name: listbox
description: A list of selectable options presented on its own, not as a combobox popup. Selection can be single or multiple.

requires.roles.label: the listbox has aria-labelledby or aria-label
requires.states.selected: aria-selected set to true on each selected option, false on the rest
requires.states.multiselectable: aria-multiselectable set to true when more than one option can be selected at once
requires.keyboard.ArrowUp: moves focus to the previous option
requires.keyboard.ArrowDown: moves focus to the next option
requires.keyboard.TypeAhead: typing a character moves focus to the next option whose name starts with that character; typing several characters in rapid succession matches on the accumulated string
